TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-Se.Lay-s-te La-mu-li-ci-pu-s a Lay-s-te kakitaan a tatami ci Ye-se-bu.Lay-s-te OM PC PRS FRCSE kakitaan' "kamu Ing-kow, Joseph Lister, Baron Lister of Lyme Regis, 1827 a mihca 4 a bulan 5 a demiad1912 a mihca 2 a bulad 10 a demiad", Ing-kow way-ke a misaydan, hungti sye-cya-huy-cang "1895 a mihcaan1900 a mihcaan", way-ke micici'ay misiwduk nalimaan atu mipatiyak nganga nu"ayzaay way-ke-sye a wama". ¬∑ŤźäśĖĮÁČĻOM PC PRS FRCSE (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Joseph Lister, Baron Lister of Lyme RegisÔľõ1827ŚĻī4śúą5śó•‚ÄĒ1912ŚĻī2śúą10śó•), ". nilaculan masakapahay a nikauzip Lay-s-te lecuh i Ing-kow Si-han E-pu-tun "Upton House", wama ci Ye-han.cya-ke-li-s-te ' Ing a kamu, Joseph Jackson Lister" u malaheciay nu misiwbayay a tademaw, namigingkiw misanga' tu caya kakapah ku nikalawpeskulit tanusuk a dil, sakayhung-sye-ciw a nigingkiw malanipilian nu Ing-kow hwang-cya sye-hu a yen-s. (Upton House), . Lay-s-te i Tow-te-na-mu milayap tu saayaway a nipasubana', a i 1844 a mihcaan micumud Lun-tun talakaway syen minanan, 1853 a mihcaan paheze namicudad hawsa tayza i Ay-tin-paw talakaway a cacudadan lalid a migingkiw. 1856 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad ciniza atu pasubana'ay a saydan James Syme a tatayna Agnes Syme malaacawa, malaacawa tu hawsa, i Ay-tipaw talakaway a cacudadan mala musakamuay a saydan, mikawaw aca tu way-ke a misaydan. James SymešĻčŚ•≥Agnes Syme . pisakakawawan a nikauzip 1860 a mihcaan-1869 a mihcaan ci Lay-s-te i Ing-kow-Ke-la-s-ke talakaway a cacudadan mala way-ke-cyaw-so. 1861 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te mala Ke-la-s-ke hung-cya padekuan u sakatusa a kawaw tu way-ke misaydan. i Lay-s-te a ziday, i-sye-cye azaawen tu sapiswduk, itawya way-ke micici'ay caay katalakaw ku laheci, caay katalakaw ku pikawaw. ci Ke-la-s micaliway mitapal maazih, kapah ku banges mapitekay a ukak nu imelangay zuma caay kadayum amalalid, patahkal tu nizatengan, amalalid zahan nu hekal a kahini. 1865 a mihcaan i Ke-la-s-ke talakaway a cacudadan mala u i-sye-way-ke cyaw-su hawsa, ci Lay-s-te saayaway patahkal tu azaawen tu sapiswduk zikuz nu picici' a malalid u angangan a lalekalan. . uya a mihca 8 a bulad 12 a demiad, micici' ciniza tu maketunay a kuku nu imelangay, mipili' u abu cilmin ku sapiswduk, a mikawaw tu mahiniay misumad tu kawaw, pasu, misaydan sicadung tu salengacay zikuc, sapicici' a u akutiay ku sapisilud,ayaw a xmicici' misaydan atu padekuay kanca a mibanaw tu lima,duka nu imelangay amiswduku sa siketen tu pung-tay, uyni dadaw a mangaay ku imelangay. siketen tu pung-tay, uyni dadaw a mangaay ku imelangay.1864 a mihca 4 abulad 7 a demiad, Ba-kow wi-sen-u-sye-cya cu Lu-i.P-s-te maazih izaw ku wiy-sen-su sakay ci Lay-s-te mizateng pawapen tu li-lun a niduduc.1867 a mihcaana, ci Lay-s-te u piswduk hanu zumaen a kawaw amisulup atu patayza i izangan, paselep tu la'cusay a izang a imelang. uyni mahiniay kasenun maselep tu picici' zikuz nu picici' malalid a imelang, tabaki ku kacakat amalaheci ku picici', zukuz nu picici' mapatayay na 45% pasentu maselep tu 15% pasentu, satu way-ke nu micici'ay mala u kapahay zakedahy a pingaay. 1969 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te panukas taluma' i Ay-tin-paw-talakaway a cacudadan mikutaytu pasubana'ay a saydan James Syme situngus tu way-ke-sye cyaw-su "Professor of Surgery" katukuh 1877 a mihcaan.1869ŚĻī, James SymeśďĒšĽĽŚ§ĖÁßĎŚ≠łśēôśéą ,ÁõīŤá≥1877ŚĻī. Lun-tin hungti a sye-yen 1877 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te situngus tu Lun-tun Kow-wang-sye-yen misilud way-ke-sye-cyaw-su "Professor of Clinical Surgery" uyaan a mihca 10 a bulad 26 a demiad pabinawlad mikawaw tu mahiniay ku-ke miciciay, namahiza, kibisien miswduku likec Iihaminnu kanatal haymaw satu patizeng mulekal. Situngus ciniza tuIng-kow lin-tun Kow wang sye-yen i-sye cyaw-su katukuh 1893 a mihcaan miales, uya a mihcaan acawa niza naimelang mapatay. 1877ŚĻī, . balakiay tu a nikauzip 1896 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te mala Pu-lye-tin-ke-sye sye-huy nu mikeliday. 1912 a mihca 2 a bulad, ci Lay-s-te i Lun-tun imelang mapatay. 11895 a Mihacaan katukuh 1900 a mihcaansitungus tu nu Ing-kow hwang-cya sye-huy nu mikeliday. 1902 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te pakala tu nu Ing-kow u sangeluay sikawaway kawlah a kungpay. Ing-kow Lay-s-te paliayaw i-sye-huy au ngangna ni Lay-s-te a pangangan, ciniza uyni tu a sye-huy nu palekalay a tademaw. 1895ŚĻīŤá≥1900ŚĻī, . malalitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == j…ô-s…ô.r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô r~…ĺa-mu-r~…ĺi- ¶i-pu-s a r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô kakitaan a tatami ¶i j…ô-s…ô-bu.r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô om p ¶ p*s f* ¶s…ô kakitaan Ē~ ° "kamu iŇč-kow, *os…ôpńß r~…ĺist…ôr, baron r~…ĺist…ôr of r~…ĺjm…ô *…ôgis, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺan * a d…ômiad**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad", iŇč-kow waj-k…ô a misajdan, ńßuŇčti sj…ô- ¶ja-ńßuj- ¶aŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan**** a mińß ¶aan", waj-k…ô mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj misiwduk nar~…ĺimaan atu mipatijak ŇčaŇča nu"ajzaaj waj-k…ô-sj…ô a wama". ****om p ¶ p*s f* ¶s…ô (**:*os…ôpńß r~…ĺist…ôr, baron r~…ĺist…ôr of r~…ĺjm…ô *…ôgis*********************), ". nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan masakapańßaj a nikauzip r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i iŇč-kow si-ńßan …ô-pu-tun "upton ńßous…ô", wama ¶i j…ô-ńßan. ¶ja-k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-t…ô Ē~ ° iŇč a kamu, *os…ôpńß *a ¶kson r~…ĺist…ôr" u mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj nu misiwbajaj a tad…ômaw, namigiŇčkiw misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶aja kakapańß ku nikar~…ĺawp…ôskur~…ĺit tanusuk a dir~…ĺ, sakajńßuŇč-sj…ô- ¶iw a nigiŇčkiw mar~…ĺanipir~…ĺian nu iŇč-kow ńßwaŇč- ¶ja sj…ô-ńßu a j…ôn-s. (upton ńßous…ô), . r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô i tow-t…ô-na-mu mir~…ĺajap tu saajawaj a nipasubana Ē~ °, a i **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud r~…ĺun-tun tar~…ĺakawaj sj…ôn minanan, **** a mińß ¶aan pańß…ôz…ô nami ¶udad ńßawsa tajza i aj-tin-paw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan r~…ĺar~…ĺid a migiŇčkiw. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ¶iniza atu pasubana Ē~ °aj a sajdan *am…ôs sjm…ô a tatajna agn…ôs sjm…ô mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, mar~…ĺaa ¶awa tu ńßawsa, i aj-tipaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…ĺa musakamuaj a sajdan, mikawaw a ¶a tu waj-k…ô a misajdan. *am…ôs sjm…ô**agn…ôs sjm…ô . pisakakawawan a nikauzip **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô i iŇč-kow-k…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…ĺa waj-k…ô- ¶jaw-so. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô mar~…ĺa k…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô ńßuŇč- ¶ja pad…ôkuan u sakatusa a kawaw tu waj-k…ô misajdan. i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô a zidaj, i-sj…ô- ¶j…ô azaaw…ôn tu sapiswduk, itawja waj-k…ô mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj ¶aaj katar~…ĺakaw ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ¶aaj katar~…ĺakaw ku pikawaw. ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺa-s mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj mitapar~…ĺ maazińß, kapańß ku baŇč…ôs mapit…ôkaj a ukak nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj zuma ¶aaj kadajum amar~…ĺar~…ĺid, patańßkar~…ĺ tu nizat…ôŇčan, amar~…ĺar~…ĺid zańßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kańßini. **** a mińß ¶aan i k…ô-r~…ĺa-s-k…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…ĺa u i-sj…ô-waj-k…ô ¶jaw-su ńßawsa, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu azaaw…ôn tu sapiswduk zikuz nu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid u aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. . uja a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ¶iniza tu mak…ôtunaj a kuku nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° u abu ¶ir~…ĺmin ku sapiswduk, a mikawaw tu mańßiniaj misumad tu kawaw, pasu, misajdan si ¶aduŇč tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ziku ¶, sapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° a u akutiaj ku sapisir~…ĺud,ajaw a *mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° misajdan atu pad…ôkuaj kan ¶a a mibanaw tu r~…ĺima,duka nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj amiswduku sa sik…ôt…ôn tu puŇč-taj, ujni dadaw a maŇčaaj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj. sik…ôt…ôn tu puŇč-taj, ujni dadaw a maŇčaaj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj.**** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, ba-kow wi-s…ôn-u-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶u r~…ĺu-i.p-s-t…ô maazińß izaw ku wij-s…ôn-su sakaj ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô mizat…ôŇč pawap…ôn tu r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun a nidudu ¶.**** a mińß ¶aana, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô u piswduk ńßanu zuma…ôn a kawaw amisur~…ĺup atu patajza i izaŇčan, pas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a izaŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ujni mańßiniaj kas…ônun mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° zikuz nu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺid a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, tabaki ku ka ¶akat amar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °, zukuz nu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° mapatajaj na **% pas…ôntu mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu **% pas…ôntu, satu waj-k…ô nu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj mar~…ĺa u kapańßaj zak…ôdańßj a piŇčaaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i aj-tin-paw-tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mikutajtu pasubana Ē~ °aj a sajdan *am…ôs sjm…ô situŇčus tu waj-k…ô-sj…ô ¶jaw-su "prof…ôssor of surg…ôrj" katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan.*****, *am…ôs sjm…ô******* ,*******. r~…ĺun-tin ńßuŇčti a sj…ô-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô situŇčus tu r~…ĺun-tun kow-waŇč-sj…ô-j…ôn misir~…ĺud waj-k…ô-sj…ô- ¶jaw-su "prof…ôssor of ¶r~…ĺini ¶ar~…ĺ surg…ôrj" ujaan a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad pabinawr~…ĺad mikawaw tu mańßiniaj ku-k…ô mi ¶i ¶iaj, namańßiza, kibisi…ôn miswduku r~…ĺik…ô ¶ iińßaminnu kanatar~…ĺ ńßajmaw satu patiz…ôŇč mur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. situŇčus ¶iniza tuiŇč-kow r~…ĺin-tun kow waŇč sj…ô-j…ôn i-sj…ô ¶jaw-su katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan miar~…ĺ…ôs, uja a mińß ¶aan a ¶awa niza naim…ôr~…ĺaŇč mapataj. *****, . bar~…ĺakiaj tu a nikauzip **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô mar~…ĺa pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tin-k…ô-sj…ô sj…ô-ńßuj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô i r~…ĺun-tun im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mapataj. ***** a mińßa ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aansituŇčus tu nu iŇč-kow ńßwaŇč- ¶ja sj…ô-ńßuj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô pakar~…ĺa tu nu iŇč-kow u saŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj sikawawaj kawr~…ĺańß a kuŇčpaj. iŇč-kow r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô par~…ĺiajaw i-sj…ô-ńßuj au ŇčaŇčna ni r~…ĺaj-s-t…ô a paŇčaŇčan, ¶iniza ujni tu a sj…ô-ńßuj nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. ***********, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-Se.Lay-s-te La-mu-li-ci-pu-s a Lay-s-te kakitaan a tatami ci Ye-se-bu.Lay-s-te OM PC PRS FRCSE kakitaan' "kamu Ing-kow, Joseph Lister, Baron Lister of Lyme Regis, 1827 a mihca 4 a bulan 5 a demiad1912 a mihca 2 a bulad 10 a demiad", Ing-kow way-ke a misaydan, hungti sye-cya-huy-cang "1895 a mihcaan1900 a mihcaan", way-ke micici'ay misiwduk nalimaan atu mipatiyak nganga nu"ayzaay way-ke-sye a wama". ¬∑ŤźäśĖĮÁČĻOM PC PRS FRCSE (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Joseph Lister, Baron Lister of Lyme RegisÔľõ1827ŚĻī4śúą5śó•‚ÄĒ1912ŚĻī2śúą10śó•), ". nilaculan masakapahay a nikauzip Lay-s-te lecuh i Ing-kow Si-han E-pu-tun "Upton House", wama ci Ye-han.cya-ke-li-s-te ' Ing a kamu, Joseph Jackson Lister" u malaheciay nu misiwbayay a tademaw, namigingkiw misanga' tu caya kakapah ku nikalawpeskulit tanusuk a dil, sakayhung-sye-ciw a nigingkiw malanipilian nu Ing-kow hwang-cya sye-hu a yen-s. (Upton House), . Lay-s-te i Tow-te-na-mu milayap tu saayaway a nipasubana', a i 1844 a mihcaan micumud Lun-tun talakaway syen minanan, 1853 a mihcaan paheze namicudad hawsa tayza i Ay-tin-paw talakaway a cacudadan lalid a migingkiw. 1856 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad ciniza atu pasubana'ay a saydan James Syme a tatayna Agnes Syme malaacawa, malaacawa tu hawsa, i Ay-tipaw talakaway a cacudadan mala musakamuay a saydan, mikawaw aca tu way-ke a misaydan. James SymešĻčŚ•≥Agnes Syme . pisakakawawan a nikauzip 1860 a mihcaan-1869 a mihcaan ci Lay-s-te i Ing-kow-Ke-la-s-ke talakaway a cacudadan mala way-ke-cyaw-so. 1861 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te mala Ke-la-s-ke hung-cya padekuan u sakatusa a kawaw tu way-ke misaydan. i Lay-s-te a ziday, i-sye-cye azaawen tu sapiswduk, itawya way-ke micici'ay caay katalakaw ku laheci, caay katalakaw ku pikawaw. ci Ke-la-s micaliway mitapal maazih, kapah ku banges mapitekay a ukak nu imelangay zuma caay kadayum amalalid, patahkal tu nizatengan, amalalid zahan nu hekal a kahini. 1865 a mihcaan i Ke-la-s-ke talakaway a cacudadan mala u i-sye-way-ke cyaw-su hawsa, ci Lay-s-te saayaway patahkal tu azaawen tu sapiswduk zikuz nu picici' a malalid u angangan a lalekalan. . uya a mihca 8 a bulad 12 a demiad, micici' ciniza tu maketunay a kuku nu imelangay, mipili' u abu cilmin ku sapiswduk, a mikawaw tu mahiniay misumad tu kawaw, pasu, misaydan sicadung tu salengacay zikuc, sapicici' a u akutiay ku sapisilud,ayaw a xmicici' misaydan atu padekuay kanca a mibanaw tu lima,duka nu imelangay amiswduku sa siketen tu pung-tay, uyni dadaw a mangaay ku imelangay. siketen tu pung-tay, uyni dadaw a mangaay ku imelangay.1864 a mihca 4 abulad 7 a demiad, Ba-kow wi-sen-u-sye-cya cu Lu-i.P-s-te maazih izaw ku wiy-sen-su sakay ci Lay-s-te mizateng pawapen tu li-lun a niduduc.1867 a mihcaana, ci Lay-s-te u piswduk hanu zumaen a kawaw amisulup atu patayza i izangan, paselep tu la'cusay a izang a imelang. uyni mahiniay kasenun maselep tu picici' zikuz nu picici' malalid a imelang, tabaki ku kacakat amalaheci ku picici', zukuz nu picici' mapatayay na 45% pasentu maselep tu 15% pasentu, satu way-ke nu micici'ay mala u kapahay zakedahy a pingaay. 1969 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te panukas taluma' i Ay-tin-paw-talakaway a cacudadan mikutaytu pasubana'ay a saydan James Syme situngus tu way-ke-sye cyaw-su "Professor of Surgery" katukuh 1877 a mihcaan.1869ŚĻī, James SymeśďĒšĽĽŚ§ĖÁßĎŚ≠łśēôśéą ,ÁõīŤá≥1877ŚĻī. Lun-tin hungti a sye-yen 1877 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te situngus tu Lun-tun Kow-wang-sye-yen misilud way-ke-sye-cyaw-su "Professor of Clinical Surgery" uyaan a mihca 10 a bulad 26 a demiad pabinawlad mikawaw tu mahiniay ku-ke miciciay, namahiza, kibisien miswduku likec Iihaminnu kanatal haymaw satu patizeng mulekal. Situngus ciniza tuIng-kow lin-tun Kow wang sye-yen i-sye cyaw-su katukuh 1893 a mihcaan miales, uya a mihcaan acawa niza naimelang mapatay. 1877ŚĻī, . balakiay tu a nikauzip 1896 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te mala Pu-lye-tin-ke-sye sye-huy nu mikeliday. 1912 a mihca 2 a bulad, ci Lay-s-te i Lun-tun imelang mapatay. 11895 a Mihacaan katukuh 1900 a mihcaansitungus tu nu Ing-kow hwang-cya sye-huy nu mikeliday. 1902 a mihcaan, ci Lay-s-te pakala tu nu Ing-kow u sangeluay sikawaway kawlah a kungpay. Ing-kow Lay-s-te paliayaw i-sye-huy au ngangna ni Lay-s-te a pangangan, ciniza uyni tu a sye-huy nu palekalay a tademaw. 1895ŚĻīŤá≥1900ŚĻī, . malalitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay a natinengan
